name: spotify-add-tracks
description: Add tracks to an existing Spotify playlist by URI. Use after creating a playlist or when asked to 'add songs to a playlist', 'add these tracks', 'populate a playlist'. Track URIs come from spotify-top-tracks or spotify-artists-top-tracks results (the uri field on each track, format: spotify:track:ID). Call spotify-create-playlist first if the playlist doesn't exist yet.

input.description: playlist_id is the Spotify playlist ID (required, from spotify-create-playlist result). track_uris is a list of Spotify track URIs (required, format: spotify:track:ID — get from the uri field in top-tracks or search results).

playlist_id.description: Spotify playlist ID (from create-playlist result or existing playlist)

track_uris.description: List of Spotify track URIs (spotify:track:ID format) to add

output.description: Spotify snapshot_id confirming the tracks were added.
